name: Word Rotate
description: A text component that rotates through a list of words with a smooth vertical transition, perfect for cycling through features or descriptors.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections with rotating descriptors, feature highlights, or anywhere you want to cycle through multiple words/phrases.

props.name: words
props.description: Array of words to rotate through

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration each word is shown in milliseconds
